extracted.title: NEXUS Pipeline Conditions for 4/15/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day April 15, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to NEXUS's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding NEXUS's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations:
- Hanoverton (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes) Notes: Due to NEXUS Posted Outage
- Ypsilatini (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes) Notes: Due to DTE Posted Outage

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
